# Tensiometer

**Summary**: An instrument used to measure the surface tension of liquids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1987-ahmed|Ahmed, 1987]] used a Kruss K10 tensiometer to determine the critical micelle concentration (CMC).

## Key Results and Findings

- Surface tension values were plotted against surfactant concentrations to find the intersection point for CMC. ([[1987-ahmed|Ahmed, 1987, p. 51]])
